title: Chemistry and Biochemistry of Winemaking, Wine Stabilization and Aging
description: This book, "Chemistry and Biochemistry of Winemaking, Wine Stabilization and Aging," edited by Fernanda Cosme, Fernando M. Nunes, and Luís Filipe-Ribeiro, covers the chemical and biochemical aspects of winemaking, wine stabilization, and aging. It explores the scientific principles behind the production, processing, and preservation of wine, including the chemical reactions and biological processes involved. The book is a comprehensive resource for understanding the chemistry and biochemistry of winemaking.
